payload.step: Review SalivaDirect for sample processing protocol: [https://www.protocols.io/view/salivadirect-rna-extraction-free-sars-cov-2-diagno-bkjgkujw?step=11](https://www.protocols.io/view/salivadirect-rna-extraction-free-sars-cov-2-diagno-bkjgkujw?step=11)

payload.section: Inset Well Plate in Benchling Lab Notebook
payload.step: Open your Benchling Lab Notebook and insert "Lab 4" with heading "H1". Add pertinent links to protocols like the SalivaDirect protocol.

payload.section: Inset Well Plate in Benchling Lab Notebook
payload.step:
We need to set up the format for our experiment in a 96-well plate. 

Add a 96-well well plate by selecting "Insert>Well plate>96-well plate". 
[image.png]](https://content.protocols.io/public/ff5cc910650017d1b800ee5dd2e2daaffb2556d2ce15802adf29d20349e67ffa/ck6ses8e.png)
Add a 96-w "Well plate" in Benchling.

payload.section: Inset Well Plate in Benchling Lab Notebook
payload.step:
Add saliva samples 1 to 4, the no-template control and positive control using plasmid "pEX-A128-nCoV_CD". Make sure to "@-mention" the plasmid "pEX-A128-nCoV_CD" located in the BSCI:414 directory. Do not copy this to a new folder. 

[image.png]](https://content.protocols.io/public/ff5cc910650017d1b800ee5dd2e2daaffb2556d2ce15802adf29d20349e67ffa/ck6ves8e.png)
96-well plate outline in Benchling.

Add a 2x7 table using "Insert>Table". 

Copy the qPCR schedule from Step 11 in SalivaDirect into the table . Use the values from the "NEB Luna" kit. 

Add a "Saliva Sample" row containing 5ul.

Add a "TOTAL" row at the bottom and ensure reagents total 20ul. 



[image.png]](https://content.protocols.io/public/ff5cc910650017d1b800ee5dd2e2daaffb2556d2ce15802adf29d20349e67ffa/ck6yes8e.png)
Add a 2x7 table. 

[image.png]](https://content.protocols.io/public/ff5cc910650017d1b800ee5dd2e2daaffb2556d2ce15802adf29d20349e67ffa/ck6wes8e.png)
qPCR Schedule in Benchling.
